description:
No React Error Boundary wraps the application. Component errors crash the entire
UI. Additionally, 10+ async operations in useMixer.ts (lines 156-244) silently
swallow errors with .catch(() => {}).

Fix:
1. Add Error Boundary components around major UI sections (Mixer, ToneEditor, Surround)
2. Add a toast/notification system for surfacing MIDI and WASM errors
3. Replace silent .catch(() => {}) with proper error logging and user notification
title: Add React error boundaries and user-facing error feedback
